summary: Tested responsive UI/UX changes in OrderScreen.js for the Tables (Mesas) screen. All 8 features verified successfully across Desktop (1920x1080), Tablet (1024x768), and Mobile (375x667) viewports.
passed_tests: Panel de cuenta ocupa 35% en desktop (xl) - VERIFIED: xl:w-[35%] class applied, computed width correct
Panel de cuenta ocupa 45% en tablets (lg) - VERIFIED: lg:w-[45%] class applied, computed ~42% with sidebar
Grid de categorías máximo 3 columnas - VERIFIED: style='grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0px, 1fr))' with Math.min(gridSettings.categoryColumns, 3)
Botón flotante visible en móvil con cantidad e importe total - VERIFIED: data-testid='mobile-show-account-btn' showing '2 RD$ 230.40'
Click en botón flotante expande cuenta a pantalla completa - VERIFIED: mobileAccountExpanded state triggers fixed inset-0 z-40 fullscreen
Botón de retroceso en móvil cierra la vista expandida - VERIFIED: back-to-tables button collapses expanded view
Botones FACTURAR y ENVIAR son más grandes (h-14) - VERIFIED: FACTURAR height=56px, ENVIAR height=56px (h-14=56px in Tailwind)
Botón Pre-Cuenta/Anular usa h-12 - VERIFIED: Pre-Cuenta height=48px (h-12=48px in Tailwind)
Tipografía de productos aumentada a text-sm (14px) - VERIFIED: fontSize='14px' (increased from text-xs 12px)
Nombres de productos en negrita - VERIFIED: fontWeight='700' (font-bold class applied)
Mayor espaciado entre productos (p-3) - VERIFIED: itemPadding='12px' (p-3 = 12px)
seed_data_creation: Used existing Mesa 1 (ID: b2dbc73f-f549-4619-8a2b-ba697d5025e9) with existing order containing 'Agua' and 'Refresco' items
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 responsive UI features verified working correctly. OrderScreen.js responsive layout uses: lg:w-[45%] xl:w-[35%] for account panel, Math.min(gridSettings.categoryColumns, 3) for category grid max columns, mobileAccountExpanded state for mobile fullscreen view with floating button (data-testid='mobile-show-account-btn'), h-14 for FACTURAR/ENVIAR buttons, h-12 for secondary buttons, text-sm with font-bold for product names, p-3 for item padding. Test table: b2dbc73f-f549-4619-8a2b-ba697d5025e9 (Mesa 1). Login: Admin PIN 0000.
